name: Double Chocolate Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a square pan, measuring 8 x 8 x 2 inches.
3. In a small mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top of the batter.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
Variation: Chocolate Banana Snack Cake
- Decrease water to 1/2 cup.
- Stir in 1/2 cup mashed, ripe banana (from 1 medium banana) before pouring the batter into the pan.
